section_name: Application for and Issuance of License
text:
(a) The commission may by rule provide for the filing of a license application and the issuance of a license by electronic means.

(b) The commission may limit applicant eligibility under Subsection (a) if the rules include reasonable eligibility criteria.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 201. Gen. Provisions & Admin.
##### § 201.932 — Application for and Issuance of License

(a) The commission may by rule provide for the filing of a license application and the issuance of a license by electronic means.

(b) The commission may limit applicant eligibility under Subsection (a) if the rules include reasonable eligibility criteria.

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 1171, Sec. 1.15, eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The commission may by rule provide for the filing of a license application and the issuance of a license by electronic means.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The commission may limit applicant eligibility under Subsection (a) if the rules include reasonable eligibility criteria.
